title: PasiAntyThrow
description: This plugin block a throw given items in given worlds
body:
**Have you always been annoyed by players who use windcharge at spawn? This plugin blocks the shooting of certain items in certain worlds, it supports title and chat messages**


# My plans for the future features #
- actionbar messages
- WG support
- ~~Adding egg support for new chickens when they come out as a stable version~~ **DONE 1.0.5 BETA**


# Commands(v1.0.5-BETA)
<details>
<summary>Coommands</summary>
  
```/pasiantythrow``` ```(/pat)``` #Plugin managment command

**Subcommands:**
- ```reload``` #reload a plugin
</details>

# Permissions(v1.0.5-BETA)
<details>
<summary>Permissions</summary>
  
- ```pat.bypass.<item>``` allows you to bypass the blocking of throwing a given item
 
- ```pat.reload``` allows you to use the /pat reload command
</details>

# Default config:(v1.0.5-BETA)
  

<details>
<summary>Config</summary>

```
# PasiAntyThrow config

default:
  type: default
  block:
    windcharge: false
    bow:
      arrows: false
      spectralarrows: false
    crossbow:
      arrows: false
      spectralarrows: false
      fireworks: false
    trident: false
    fishingrod: false
    enderpearl: false
    firework: false
    snowball: false
    ender_eye: false
    eggs:
      regular: false
      blue: false
      brown: false
    BottleXp: true

example_world:
  type: world
  block:
    windcharge: true
    bow:
      arrows: true
      spectralarrows: true
    crossbow:
      arrows: true
      spectralarrows: true
      fireworks: true
    trident: true
    fishingrod: true
    enderpearl: true
    firework: true
    snowball: true
    ender_eye: true
    eggs:
      regular: true
      blue: true
      brown: true
    BottleXp: true
```

# ATTENTION
**ATTENTION THIS PLUGIN IS A BETA AND SOME EXPLOITS MAY OCCUR, THERE HAS ALREADY BEEN COPYING PEARLS, SNOW BALLS AND EGGS, SO BEFORE ADDING TO THE MAIN SERVER, CHECK IF IT WORKS WELL FOR YOU AND IF ANY, REPORT ON MY DISCORD**
